market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Telegram’s shortlink domain is back online after day-long suspension
articles.description: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov confirmed an outage in a tweet, saying that short-links to the messaging app had "stopped working."

articles.title: Spotify expands its AI push with a ChatGPT-like music assistant
articles.description: Spotify is rolling out a new AI-powered conversational feature that lets Premium subscribers chat with the app to discover music, podcasts, and audiobooks, and more.

articles.title: For pension funds, tokenization’s real play is balance-sheet management, Fidelity’s Lai says
articles.description: Fidelity International’s Giselle Lai argues that the most compelling long-term use case for tokenized funds is balance-sheet management for large, global institutions, not 24/7 liquidity.

articles.title: Superhuman’s new auto-draft feature almost makes me like AI replies
articles.description: Superhuman’s latest AI email drafting feature is its most convincing yet, generating replies that often required little to no editing in our testing.

articles.title: OpenAI quietly adds Kalshi World Cup odds to ChatGPT: Report
articles.description: OpenAI’s ChatGPT now displays Kalshi’s World Cup prediction market odds in search results, marking the AI firm’s first reported deal with a prediction market platform.

articles.title: Strategy became a symbol of the dot-com crash: Could history repeat?
articles.description: MicroStrategy blew up during the dot-com era, before Michael Saylor transformed it into the world's largest corporate Bitcoin holder. Did he learn his lesson?

articles.title: OpenAI 為一般使用者發布 GPT-5.6 提示詞指南：別想太多，先講結果
articles.description: OpenAI 針對最新的 GPT-5.6 系列推出提示詞撰寫指南，同時涵蓋一般 ChatGPT 介面與 Cod […]

articles.title: Humanity Protocol to prioritize operational security following $36M hack
articles.description: Humanity Protocol’s founder said they will refocus on operational security, as malicious actors are switching from smart contract vulnerabilities to exploiting human behavior.

articles.title: Hut 8 price target hiked to $165 at Benchmark as AI pivot reshapes valuation
articles.description: Mark Palmer said Hut 8's Beacon Point project transforms the company into an AI infrastructure platform with a long growth runway.

articles.title: U.S. June CPI fell 0.4%, likely cooling move toward Fed rate hikes
articles.description: This morning's report could go a long way toward determining whether the Federal Reserve raises interest rates at its late-July meeting.

articles.title: ECB picks firms including Deutsche Bank, Revolut for digital euro pilot
articles.description: The pilot will test a beta version of the digital euro for online, offline, in-store, and e-commerce payments with ECB and central bank staff as users.

articles.title: Japan’s biggest card network taps Circle to bring stablecoins to 40 million merchants
articles.description: JCB and Circle will explore using USDC for cross-border payments and merchant transactions as Japan ramps up efforts to bring stablecoins into everyday commerce.

articles.title: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
articles.description: ABA and state banking associations published a joint letter calling for more detail on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin yield provisions, ahead of the bill’s House hearing on Friday.

articles.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
articles.description: Superteam UK lead Stephen “Cap” Newnham is taking on Nigel Farage in the Clacton by-election with pledges on pension reform and onchain transparency.

articles.title: ECB picks 36 payment providers to test digital euro ahead of 2027 pilot
articles.description: The European Central Bank will beta test a digital euro with 36 providers, including Revolut, after the project drew more than 50 applications.

articles.title: U.S.-Iran escalation weighs on bitcoin, stocks as oil climbs
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 14, 2026

articles.title: Bitcoin's BIP-110 sparked a fight over who gets to decide the future of Bitcoin
articles.description: BIP-110 sought to limit non-financial data on Bitcoin's blockchain but instead reignited debates over censorship and decentralization.

articles.title: Prediction markets just crushed traditional sportsbooks in a massive $50 billion World Cup breakout
articles.description: Prediction markets just topped $50 billion in monthly volume, capping off the first month of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.title: Bitcoin’s great rotation: Long-term holders pass supply to a new generation of buyers
articles.description: Long-term holders are quietly transferring supply to a new generation of buyers, but looming Federal Reserve rate hikes could still trigger the capitulation markets have been waiting for.

articles.title: AI has not triggered DeFi ‘hackpocalypse,’ Dragonfly partner says
articles.description: Total value stolen and median hack size are declining compared to 2025, signaling that the AI hacking apocalypse was a false alarm, argued Dragonfly managing partner Haseeb Qureshi.
